title: sabicea ferruginea
intro: Sabicea ferruginea, also known as the rusty sabicea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sabicea ferruginea include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Sabicea ferruginea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
